title: Add dependencies as an option in custom automations
excerpt: Are there plans to make dependencies an option in custom automations?  For instance, If status changes to “complete” and the status of the dependency is “not started” change dependency status to “in progress”.

posts.author: Brobb (Buffy Robbins)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there plans to make dependencies an option in custom automations? For instance, If status changes to “complete” and the status of the dependency is “not started” change dependency status to “in progress”.

posts.author: CharlotteG (Charlotte)
posts.cookedHtml: I really need this ability for automations as i need to create an IF automation that includes a dependency column. without the IF it caused Chaos and more manual work so i had to turn off the automation!
